prompt:
Subject: window in early summer, purple yukata
Person/Expression: Japanese woman in her late 20s, calm mature atmosphere, rounded neat silhouette, elegant low-bun black hair, purple flower ornament, translucent skin, Japanese-style natural makeup, gentle and elegant expression, natural eye contact
Clothing/Pose: Pale lavender floral yukata, purple obi, refreshing kimono styling, sitting on a wooden windowsill, one hand on the seat, the other on the knee, elegant sitting posture with legs slightly crossed
Background/Light: Interior of a black wooden building, large open window, bright early summer greenery outside, bright daytime natural light, soft backlighting from the window, delicate highlights on hair and silhouette
Composition/Camera: Vertical composition, full-body close-up portrait, person placed to the left, framing utilizing the window frame, 85mm portrait lens, f1.8, shallow depth of field, natural bokeh in background, professional photography style
Texture/Style: Ultra-HD 4K, 8K quality, realistic photographic expression, natural skin texture, delicate hair detail, high-definition depiction of yukata fabric and floral patterns, soft tones, neat and elegant Japanese-style portrait
Negative: Low quality, unnatural legs, unnatural hands, distorted face, extra fingers, dark shadows or dirt on legs, skin corruption, overexposure, excessive processing, text, logo, watermark
